bible_name: Light and Shadow World Foundation Bible
description: Pre-World Generation Architecture defining systemic interactions, biome layouts, and adaptive mechanics.

world-foundation-rule.text: The world is a dynamic ecosystem where gameplay systems emerge from biome, encounter density, and systemic interactions rather than static map design.

world-structure-rule.text: World structure is hierarchical but non-linear, allowing free traversal while maintaining emergent difficulty scaling based on biome and region.

biome-rule.text: Biomes define environmental modifiers that influence monsters, loot, and combat conditions without rigidly locking content to specific zones.

spawn-ecosystem-rule.text: Monster spawns are dynamically generated based on biome density, player activity, and regional encounter balancing systems.

difficulty-rule.text: World difficulty is emergent and based on encounter composition rather than static level zoning.

loot-world-rule.text: Loot distribution is biome and encounter-driven, with region-specific modifiers influencing item generation and rarity outcomes.

progression-world-rule.text: Player progression is not restricted by world zones and is instead shaped by performance-based XP and biome-driven encounters.

travel-rule.text: World traversal is free-form with optional fast travel systems and no level-gated geographic restrictions.

combat_bible.impact: Encounter difficulty dictates Time-To-Kill (TTK). Dangerous combinations of monster behaviors shape the battlefield dynamically.
mechanics: Group synergy buffs for overlapping spawns
Combat tempo adjustments based on zone danger

spell_skill_bible.impact: Elemental affinities of zones amplify or dampen active spell effectiveness.
mechanics: Volcanic region boosts Fire spell damage by 15%
Frozen Tundra increases Ice cooldowns but amplifies freeze durations
Sacred Lands increase holy healing efficacy

monster_bible.impact: Controls monster family distributions and adaptivity to regional danger ratings.
mechanics: Elite scaling in high player activity areas
Environmental hazard resistances for native creatures

loot_bible.impact: Item drops are filtered through biome loot tables and regional rarity modifiers.

progression_bible.impact: Defines how performance-based XP behaves across biomes without imposing hard caps.
mechanics: Underdog bonus: XP amplified when defeating higher difficulty encounter compositions

vocation_bible.impact: Classes have high/low performance matches with specific biomes based on utility skills.
mechanics: Ranger tracking speed increased in Forest biome
Paladin divine protection scaled in Sacred Lands
Necromancer minion cap increased in Corrupted Zones
